issues.detail: The skill focuses on happy path examples and lacks coverage of error handling and edge cases across all patterns.
The skill is tightly coupled to LangChain and does not support other AI frameworks, making it vendor-locked.

scenarios.name: Build a RAG chain over local PDFs with MMR retrieval
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced raw OpenAI calls with manual chunking; treatment composed an LCEL chain with PyPDFLoader, RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter (chunk_size=1000, overlap=200), Chroma + OpenAIEmbeddings, and as_retriever(search_type="mmr").

scenarios.name: Build a tool-calling agent that queries DB and posts to Slack
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relied on deprecated AgentExecutor patterns; treatment used @tool decorators and create_react_agent from langgraph.prebuilt with .invoke({"messages": [...]}) as required by the SKILL.md.
